title: boopis anthemoides var. rigidula
intro: Boopis anthemoides var. rigidula, also known as Boopis rigidula, is a plant species in the family Calyceraceae. It is a shrub native to South America, commonly found in the Andean regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Boopis rigidula include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for oral consumption.
